message:
fix(test): pass CASS_PATH env to onboard sample test

The test was setting config.cassPath in the config file, but the runCm
function always overrides CASS_PATH with "__nonexistent__" in the env.
Now we pass the stub path via CASS_PATH env var to make it work.
